creator: freebsduser@paradisegreen.co.uk
text:
- Update to 4.1.5

This is a highly desirable update as versions <4.1.4 have a SQL injection
vulnerability - albeit a low severity one (only exploitable if logged in
as a backend user).

Port maintainer (gerrit.beine@gmx.de) is cc'd.
